title: Madurai
description: Madurai, known as the 'Athens of the East,' is one of the oldest continuously inhabited cities in the world. Located on the banks of the Vaigai River in Tamil Nadu, it is the cultural capital of the state, famous for its magnificent Dravidian-style temples, vibrant street markets, and rich historical heritage spanning over two millennia.
travel_methods: The city is well-connected by air via Madurai International Airport, by rail through Madurai Junction, and via an extensive network of state and national highways.
